PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAGLE, RODOLFO TARLIT $318.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $318.00, AWARD OF ARBITRATOR AND COSTS ARE FOR PLAINTIFF JONATHAN ARGUELLES ONLY. CLAIMS OF PLAINTIFFS LETICIA AVENA AND JONATHAN ARGUELLES JR ARE DENIED.
